info.description: Member-only guided journeys inside the Reset Room vault. Each one can have audio (private podcast) and/or video (Bunny.net Stream) plus a companion PDF.

description.description: Short description shown on the vault grid card. 1-2 sentences.

kind.description: Acts like folders on the live Vault page — members can filter by this. Use 'Audio meditation' or 'E-book' or 'Workbook' for those formats; use one of the journey types for guided journeys.

tone_colour.description: Accent colour for the card border + filter. Use one of the brand hex values (e.g. #F280AA pink, #FFD07A yellow, #7BAFDD blue, #5DCAA5 green, #FAA21B amber, #6E3A5A plum, #A67C3A bronze).

duration.description: Free-text duration, e.g. '12 min' or '20 mins'.

audio_file.description: The MP3 for this journey. Pushed to the private podcast feed; members can also download directly.

video_url.description: Bunny.net Stream embed URL (or any iframe-embeddable URL). Optional — leave blank for audio-only journeys.

video_thumbnail.description: Poster image for the video player. Best size 1280x720 (16:9 landscape), JPEG, max 500 KB.

companion_pdf.description: Optional downloadable PDF (workbook, reflection prompts, notes).

body.description: Full description / 'About this journey' content shown below the player.

recorded_date.description: When this journey was recorded (optional, shown in metadata).

sort_order.description: Lower numbers appear first in the vault grid. Use to surface foundational journeys.

is_active.description: Untick to hide from the vault without deleting.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title override (60 chars max). Leave blank to use the page/item name. Shown in Google search results and browser tabs.

seo_description.description: Short summary for Google and ChatGPT (1-2 sentences, ~155 chars). Write what someone searching for this would actually type. Fills in automatically when you Save — leave blank unless you want to override
